svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 510px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 190px; height: 1px; padding-top: 203px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Data sources
• OpenFlights (air routes)
• GeoNames (city populations)
• OSM + GRIP (land topology)
• OSM ferries / cargo (water)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 190px; height: 1px; padding-top: 203px; margin-left: 270px;

div.div:
MODULE 1 — retrieve
pull raw data per layer
(openflights · geonames · ferries)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 190px; height: 1px; padding-top: 203px; margin-left: 530px;

div.div:
MODULE 2 — netgen
standardise layers →
emit each (region × layer-set)
as GraphML
ONE uniform recipe / region

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 193px; margin-left: 790px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MODULE 3 — evaluate
• models SIR/SIS/SEIR/SQIR
• strategies (vaccination)
• interdiction (close routes)
• metrics ρ(deg,btw), gateways
• aggregate → tables
